Interface ReadableBakery

All Superinterfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, HasTimer, Positioned, ReadableStructure
All Known Implementing Classes:
Bakery, UnownedBakery
public interface ReadableBakery extends ReadableStructure, HasTimer
